signals.title: Kids Online Safety Act (KOSA) - Senate Version
signals.summary: Mandates platforms implement 'duty of care' for minors, requires opt-out of algorithmic recommendations for users under 17, and mandates parental tools.
key_provisions: Duty of care standard for platforms with minor users
Design features to reduce addictive usage patterns
signals.raw_text_excerpt: SEC. 3. DUTY OF CARE. A covered platform shall act in the best interests of a minor...

signals.title: COPPA 2.0 Expansion Proposal
signals.summary: Expands COPPA protections to cover users aged 13-16, requiring verifiable parental consent for data collection.
key_provisions: Bans targeted advertising to all minors
Data minimization requirements for minor data
signals.raw_text_excerpt: The term 'child' means an individual under the age of 17...

signals.title: Protecting Americans' Data from Foreign Adversaries Act
signals.summary: Prohibits data brokers from selling sensitive data to foreign adversary countries, with specific provisions for social media platforms.
key_provisions: Bans sale of sensitive data to China, Russia, Iran, North Korea
Includes social media usage data as 'sensitive'
Civil penalties up to $50,000 per violation
signals.raw_text_excerpt: It shall be unlawful for a data broker to sell, transfer, or share...
